description: A medical publications manager needs to create a strategic publication plan for a product based on upcoming data readouts.

nodes.task_description: Identify all ongoing and planned clinical trials for the product and their expected completion dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a timeline of upcoming data milestones.

nodes.task_description: Identify key scientific conferences and journals relevant to the product's therapeutic area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of target congresses and journals.

nodes.task_description: Develop a strategic plan that maps each data readout to a target publication or presentation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a comprehensive plan, including abstracts, posters, and manuscripts.

nodes.task_description: Track the execution of the plan in a publication management software.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters all planned publications into the system to track their status.
